title: Fix Clear Filter and Multiple Date Filter Combination Not Working
description:
Fixes two date filter issues:

1. **Clear filter not working after date selection**: After selecting a date range filter and then clicking Clear Filter, the date filters reset to defaults but filtered records continued to show. Re-selecting "All" also did not reset.

2. **Multiple date filters not combining**: When filtering by all three date fields (Created On, Last Modified, Last Viewed), only the most recently changed filter was applied — the other two were ignored.

The fix consolidated three separate date filter functions into a single combined `filter_on_dates` function that evaluates all three date range conditions simultaneously using DataTables `ext.search`. When "All" is selected for a date filter, that condition is bypassed. Clear filter now properly clears all date filter state and redraws the table.
acceptance_criteria: Clear Filter resets all date filters and shows all records
Re-selecting 'All' on a date filter resets that filter
All three date filters can be applied simultaneously
Combined date filters return only records matching all active conditions
middleware_changes: Replaced three separate date filter functions with a single combined filter_on_dates function that evaluates all three date conditions using DataTables ext.search push pattern.
implementation_notes: The root cause was each date filter pushing its own separate ext.search function, causing them to overwrite each other. The consolidated function checks all three date ranges in a single evaluation and handles the 'All' selection as a bypass condition.
comment_summary: Waqar consolidated three date filter functions into one general function and shared the implementation code in the comments.
